_comment: Plan 04-01 Task 3: enumerated call sites permitted to mutate the FeatureGraph outside the scheduler's event queue. Every NEW direct mutation from src/ must either land in an allowlisted file below or be refactored to route through schedulerRef.current?.enqueue(...). The walker only scans the files listed in `scanned_files`; everything else is considered out-of-scope for this plan.

src/compose.ts.reason: initializeProjectGraph/transitionFeatureToPlanning run during app bootstrap — no scheduler loop yet, so they execute before any tick can exist. These are one-shot setup paths, not a runtime bypass.

cancelFeatureRunWork is invoked by the scheduler handler for `ui_cancel_feature_run_work` — it runs INSIDE a tick via the closure threaded through SchedulerLoopOptions. The mutation is not a bypass; it's the queue-routed destination.

cancelTaskPreserveWorktree/cancelTaskCleanWorktree are invoked by scheduler handlers for `ui_cancel_task_preserve_worktree` and `ui_cancel_task_clean_worktree` — the task cancellation mutation runs inside the scheduler tick via the closure threaded through SchedulerLoopOptions.

src/agents/runtime.ts.reason: Legacy fallback inside mutateFeature(): only runs when deps.enqueueGraphMutation is undefined (test/legacy construction without a scheduler). Production path through compose.ts always supplies the enqueue callback.
